title: Working From Home: Is It Really Better?
passage:
Many companies are now letting their employees work from home. This is called remote work. Some people love working from home because they don't have to travel to the office. This saves time and money. They can also wear comfortable clothes and have their pets nearby. For some, this means they can focus better and get more work done. They have fewer distractions at home than in a busy office.

However, not everyone finds remote work easy. Some people miss talking to their colleagues face-to-face. They feel lonely. It can also be hard to separate work from home life. Sometimes, people work too much because their office is always with them. Others find it difficult to stay motivated without the structure of an office. They might get distracted by things at home, like chores or family.

For remote work to be successful, both the employee and the company need to make an effort. Clear communication is very important. Companies need to trust their employees. Employees need to be disciplined and manage their time well. When done right, remote work can be a great way to be productive and happy.

vocabulary.meaning: working from a location other than the main office, usually home
people who work for a company or person
to go from one place to another
things that stop you from giving your full attention to something
feeling sad because you are alone or have no friends
having a strong reason to do something
able to control yourself and work hard

questions.question: What is the main topic of the passage?
options: The benefits and challenges of working from home
The best clothes to wear at work
questions.answer: The benefits and challenges of working from home

questions.question: According to the passage, working from home can save employees time and money.
Name one reason why some people might feel lonely when working from home.
questions.answer: They miss talking to their colleagues face-to-face.

questions.question: Which of the following is mentioned as a challenge of remote work?
options: Difficulty separating work from home life
questions.answer: Difficulty separating work from home life

questions.question: The passage suggests that remote work is always easy for everyone.
